g.text: Persistence: snapshot vs run record (back-fill for PR #7)
Two file kinds share one parser pair. Snapshots are hand-editable, hash-free. Run records carry config + stats +
board blocks and are protected by a content_hash trailer (FNV-1a 64-bit).
--load-board <PATH> load snapshot OR run record (--load-from initial|final) as initial board
--continue <PATH> load run record's FINAL board, chain into a new run; records continued_from
--replay <PATH> re-execute and diff the saved final board + key stats
--extract-board <PATH> copy a run record's INITIAL/FINAL block out as a hand-editable snapshot
Auto-save: every successful run records its config + stats + boards into ./runs/<UTC>-<short-id>.gol
